arts.ttl: Monaco’s Folarin Balogun returns to full-contact training

arts.ttl: Adi Hutter: ‘I can imagine that some top clubs will be interested in Maghnes Akliouche next season.’
arts.sum: Maghnes Akliouche (22) was hot property over the summer. He enjoyed a breakthrough with AS Monaco last season, making the step up from the academy to solidify his place in…

arts.ttl: AS Monaco sale ‘put on ice’, Prince Albert II reveals
arts.sum: In January of this year, it was revealed that AS Monaco owner Dmitry Rybolovlev, following unsolicited interest, was open to selling the club. Initially reported by Les Échos, Get French Football News confirmed…
